commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh And Moses took the blood, and sprinkled it on the people, and said, Behold the blood of the covenant, which the LORD has made with you concerning all these words. Thus Christ confirmed the new covenant, by the effusion of his blood. (Tirinus) This is daily renewed upon our altars for ever. (Calmet) Our Saviour alludes to this transaction in the consecration of the chalice. (Du Hamel) If wine alone had been substituted instead of blood, the figure would have surpassed the reality. ) (Worthington).

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
